overview: Auré Atelier is a luxury fashion boutique showcase landing page with hero, about, collections gallery, and contact sections. Features GSAP animations, parallax scrolling, smooth transitions, and premium micro-interactions designed as a high-quality client demo.
features: Full-viewport hero with GSAP fade-in animations
Parallax scrolling effect on About section
Collections gallery with staggered card animations and hover micro-interactions
Contact form with loading and success feedback
Fixed navigation with scroll-to-section and mobile hamburger menu
Premium typography and luxury visual design
Smooth scroll and page transition effects
